items.original_hint: Put the black bowl on the plate.
paraphrases: Place the black bowl onto the plate.
Move the black bowl so that it rests on the plate.
Pick up the black bowl and set it down on the plate.

items.original_hint: Put the object in the target container.
paraphrases: Place the object inside the target container.
Move the object into the specified container.
Pick up the object and drop it into the target container.

items.original_hint: Move the object to the requested spatial location.
paraphrases: Place the object at the requested position.
Move the object to the specified spatial target.
Pick up the object and set it down at the target location.
